title: AI Chat Assistant for Web Stores (SaaS)
summary: Multi-tenant SaaS platform that lets web store owners embed a customizable AI chat assistant into their storefront, powered by Mastra and Google Gemini with product catalog semantic search.
highlights: Built a Next.js SaaS dashboard where tenants configure their AI agent, widget appearance, and product catalog.
Integrated Mastra with Google Gemini 2.5 Flash to power a per-tenant AI agent scoped to each store's products.
Implemented pgvector-based semantic search so the agent answers product questions from the store's catalog.
Delivered a standalone vanilla JS embeddable widget (built with Vite) that streams AI responses in real time.
Designed a multi-tenant architecture with API key authentication, rate limiting, and Stripe billing.

title: Modular .NET Core API with Notifications
summary: Modular .NET Core API built with FastEndpoints, designed around a clean separation of modules and integrated with a notification system.
highlights: Built a modular .NET Core API using FastEndpoints for structured, endpoint-per-feature organization.
Designed the architecture around independent modules to keep the codebase maintainable and scalable.
Implemented a notification system integrated across the modular structure.
Contributed as the primary .NET developer responsible for the API layer.

title: Self-Hosted Notification Platform
summary: An end-to-end notification platform built around a Next.js frontend, .NET services, RabbitMQ messaging, and PostgreSQL.
highlights: Designed and self-hosted the platform end to end.
Combined a Next.js frontend with .NET services and RabbitMQ-based messaging.
Covered architecture, deployment, and operational concerns alongside feature delivery.

title: Microservices with Multi-Project Database Architecture
summary: Designed and implemented microservices backed by purpose-built databases, scaled to handle the load requirements of multiple concurrent projects within the same platform.
highlights: Architected microservices with isolated databases tailored to each service's data model and access patterns.
Ensured each database layer could handle varying load profiles across different active projects.
Collaborated on schema design and relational modeling to match end-user roles and information needs.

title: Chat Dashboard & Chat Integration
summary: Client and Agent communication platform with an agent dashboard for message handling and notifications, integrated into an existing solution.
highlights: Led technical direction and established project specifications as Technical Lead.
Built the application from scratch, defining both frontend and backend structure.
Handled full AWS deployment and CI/CD pipeline setup.
Designed and developed the database layer.

title: Transport Company Subscription Dashboard
summary: Client dashboard for managing public transport subscriptions, developed as Technical Lead with focus on frontend and backend improvement.
highlights: Led task delegation and coached team members to improve skill sets.
Translated designs and wireframes into working frontend code.
Improved and refactored existing backend services.

title: Transport Booking Platform
summary: Client platform and CallCenter website for booking public transport trips, built from scratch with push notifications and AWS deployment.
highlights: Built backend and frontend components from scratch, including legacy code migration.
Created a push notification service for client alerts.
Configured a pipeline for client profile importing.
Handled full AWS deployment and CI/CD pipeline setup.
Designed and developed the database layer.

title: Document Application Portal (Blazor)
summary: Front office Blazor application allowing clients to submit and manage documents, integrated with third-party processing solutions and featuring complex multi-type document application forms.
highlights: Built the full client-facing front office as a Blazor application.
Implemented complex document application forms supporting multiple document types.
Integrated the frontend with third-party document processing solutions.
Delivered the complete UI using HTML and CSS within the Blazor component model.

title: Reusable Blazor Component Library
summary: A set of reusable Blazor libraries and components focused on clean APIs and maintainable UI building blocks.
highlights: Built reusable Blazor components instead of one-off screens.
Focused on clean APIs that made the library easier to consume and maintain.
Treated component quality and reuse as part of long-term UI maintainability.
